flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Jefferson Community College rose 106% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.7k → $11.7k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 21% at Jefferson Community College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.5k vs 1.9k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Jefferson Community College rose 11% between 2006 and 2009 ($3.3k → $3.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Jefferson Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.9% → 0.0%).
